title: Analilia Mejia, a Progressive Democrat, Wins Mikie Sherrill’s House Seat
description: Ms. Mejia, who helped run Sen. Bernie Sanders’s presidential campaign, beat her Republican opponent, Joe Hathaway, to win a seat Ms. Sherrill vacated after she was elected governor of New Jersey.

title: Former Treasury Secretary Henry Paulson warns U.S. needs an emergency ‘break-the-glass’ plan if Treasury demand collapses
description: Former Treasury Secretary Henry Paulson on Thursday urged U.S. policymakers to prepare an emergency plan in case demand for Treasurys breaks down — warning that a crisis in the government bond market could trigger severe consequences across the economy.

title: Jury finds that Live Nation is an illegal monopoly, but a breakup with Ticketmaster is unlikely, analysts say
description: Some analysts say the most likely outcome for Live Nation would be more damages and penalties. Shares of the concert-ticketing giant rose on Thursday after falling a day earlier.

title: Yankees’ Aaron Boone blasts ‘overly sensitive’ umpiress after first ejection of season
description: For those who thought Aaron Boone might have nothing to get ejected about with the arrival of the automated ball-strike system, think again.

title: Stream It Or Skip It: ‘Fake Profile’ Season 3 On Netflix, Another Crazy Season Of The Steamy Colombian Thriller
description: More than ever, the plot of this series feels like filler between sex scenes.
